description: PM framework v7.9 — Promotion Release (shipped 2026-05-21). Enforcement flip for the three v7.8.1 advisory gates (BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B + Mode C + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS) after a 14-day Mechanism A telemetry calibration window (2026-05-07 → 2026-05-21) showed 0 false positives across 18 + 13 + 13 firings. Single code change: BRANCH_ISOLATION_ADVISORY_MODE = True → False at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132. Reversibility runbook in .claude/entrypoints/framework-v7-9.md. Builds on v7.8.6 (Cadence Batch — make integrity-diff + unified preflight + weekly trend scans + W1 ssh-agent + dependency audit, shipped 2026-05-15), v7.8.5 (Observability Layer — Observed Patterns Catalog + W9 branch-drift alert, shipped 2026-05-13), v7.8.4 (Pre-v7.9 Telemetry Calibration & Doc-Debt Cleanup — PR cache freshness auto-refresh + TIER_TAG_LIKELY_INCORRECT heuristic narrowing + case-study-t1-references ledger, shipped 2026-05-12), v7.8.3 (Cross-Repo State Sync — state_owner gates + D-3 unified PR cite cache + V2/V9 promotions, shipped 2026-05-11), v7.8.2 (Cross-Repo Telemetry Asymmetry documented disposition, shipped 2026-05-08), v7.8.1 (Branch Isolation + Feature-Closure Completeness, advisory shipped 2026-05-07), v7.8 Bridge (Mechanisms A-F, shipped 2026-05-04), v7.7 (Validity Closure, 5 new gates, shipped 2026-04-27), v7.6 (Mechanical Enforcement, shipped 2026-04-25), v7.5 (Data Integrity Framework, 8 cooperating defenses, shipped 2026-04-24), v7.1 (72h Integrity Cycle), v7.0 (HADF). Post-promotion calendar: Phase E soak 2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04. Total framework mechanisms post-v7.9: 36 mechanical + 2 advisory (3 advisory gates flipped to enforced; 3 cycle-time advisories stay advisory by design). state↔case-study linkage 100% gated. Honesty ledger entry FT2-FH-003.

audit_closures.FW-002: Description string updated from v5.2 to v7.0 — closed.
audit_closures.FW-007: chip-profiles.json verified at 17 profiles matching spec — see chip-profiles.json.
audit_closures.FW-008: hardware-signature-table.json verified at 7 signatures matching spec — see hadf/hardware-signature-table.json.
audit_closures.FW-009: HADF hardware_context settings verified (enabled=false, blend=0.4, trust=0.7) — see dispatch-intelligence.json hardware_context section.
audit_closures.FW-010: Skill routing entries verified against actual SKILL.md files — see skill-routing.json.
audit_closures.FW-013: Cache freshness check verified — referenced files exist for sampled cache entries.
audit_closures.FW-018: Chip Affinity Map empty by design (HADF Layer 4 not yet active) — see chip-affinity-map.json.

source_of_truth.branch_policy: treat main as authoritative until external systems are resynced

v7_8_1_branch_isolation.description: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gates (advisory in v7.8.1 → enforced in v7.9). Plus 6 supporting deliverables: 3 cycle-time advisories, scripts/create-isolated-worktree.py, 2 make targets, /ux + /design pre-merge-review sub-step 6f.

v7_1_integrity_cycle.description: 72-hour recurring audit of .claude/features/*/state.json. Catches 'shipped but unreconciled' drift within 72h of occurrence instead of weeks later.

v7_5_data_integrity_framework.description: Eight cooperating defenses catching broken data at write-time, cycle-time, and readout-time. Triggered by the 2026-04-21 Google Gemini 2.5 Pro independent audit.

tier_1_2_pr_resolution_write_time.enforcement: pre-commit hook blocks bogus phases.merge.pr_number on state.json write

tier_1_3_schema_enforcement_write_time.enforces: SCHEMA_DRIFT — rejects legacy `phase` key in favor of `current_phase`

workflow_hardening_2026_04_23: pipefail + PIPESTATUS[0] captures real integrity-check.py exit
snapshot_context metadata distinguishes scheduled_cycle from manual runs
regression detection uses grep-for-token on piped report

tier_3_3_external_replication.requires: independent human or AI operator running a feature through /pm-workflow

v7_6_mechanical_enforcement.description: Promotes 4 silent agent-attention checks to write-time pre-commit failures, adds per-PR + weekly CI defenses, and explicitly enumerates 5 mechanically unclosable Class B gaps. Closes the residual Class B → Class A gap left by v7.5.

phase_1a_phase_transition_no_log.rule: current_phase change in staged state.json must have a corresponding event in .claude/logs/<feature>.log.json within the last 15 minutes (PHASE_EVENT_FRESHNESS_MIN=15). Bypass for testing: FORCE_TRANSITION_CHECKS=1.

phase_1b_phase_transition_no_timing.rule: current_phase change in staged state.json must include timing.phases.<new_phase>.started_at and, when there was a previous phase, timing.phases.<old_phase>.ended_at in the same commit.

phase_1c_broken_pr_citation_write_time.rule: Pre-commit rejects any case-study commit citing PR #N or pull/N if the number does not resolve in the cached gh pr list result. Skipped gracefully when gh is unavailable; cycle-level BROKEN_PR_CITATION still runs as safety net.

phase_1d_case_study_missing_tier_tags.rule: Pre-commit rejects scoped post-2026-04-21 case study commits when the file contains no T1/T2/T3 tier tag at all. Presence-only; tag exhaustiveness/correctness remains a Class B review gap.

phase_2a_pr_review_bot.rule: Runs schema-check + integrity-check + measurement-adoption against PR HEAD. Captures origin/main baseline via worktree. Status = failure when any required command exits non-zero or when delta > 0 (PR introduces new findings vs main). Sticky comment with marker <!-- pm-framework-pr-integrity-bot --> updates in place on each push.

phase_2b_measurement_adoption_history.rule: Append-only dated snapshots. Dedup-by-date. Atomic write via temp file + rename. Unlocks Tier 1.1 trend mode after 3 snapshots accumulate.

phase_2c_weekly_framework_status_cron.regression_rule: fully_adopted decreased OR any_adopted decreased vs prior history snapshot
phase_2c_weekly_framework_status_cron.rule: Observational-only — never blocks merges. The 72h cycle owns blocking; this owns the weekly trend.

gaps.reason: Agent-attention — deciding what counts as a cache hit is itself the judgment we cannot mechanize.
Judgment-based magnitudes; we check presence, not whether 'novelty: 0.2' is the right number.
gaps.tracking: no issue — accepted as Class B by design

gaps.reason: Preflight checks tag PRESENCE on post-2026-04-21 case studies. Whether the tag is the RIGHT tag (T1 vs T2 vs T3) requires reading prose in context.
gaps.tracking: scripts/check-case-study-preflight.py for presence; correctness handled in code review

gaps.reason: Apple/Google sign-in handshake on a real device cannot be driven by an automated test runner without crossing into the mocking-pattern v7.5 was built to avoid.
No pre-commit hook can simulate 'an external operator on an unrelated product succeeded with the framework'.
gaps.tracking: Public GitHub issue (filed as the LAST v7.6 deliverable)
gaps.observability: docs/case-studies/external/ directory — created on first external submission

policy_decisions_continued: Publish-verbatim-then-remediate: every audit finding stays visible; corrections are appended.
Honest-status labels (partial / pilot / groundwork / backlog) over rounded-up ship-claims.
Tier 3.3 external invitation filed as the LAST v7.6 deliverable, only after every other piece is on main.

tooling_attribution.claude_opus_4_7: Framework rework, plan execution, code authoring, case study (Phase 1–4).
tooling_attribution.google_gemini_2_5_pro: Independent audit on 2026-04-21 that triggered v7.5 → v7.6 (different vendor, different model family, artifact-only access).
tooling_attribution.openai_codex: SSD audit on 2026-04-19 (docs/master-plan/codex-ssd-audit-2026-04-19.md). Identified the dashboard build break + SSD sprawl that motivated several pre-v7.5 hardening commits. Did not contribute v7.5/v7.6 commits per git log evidence; if additional Codex work in the v7.5+ window is identified later, this attribution will be appended (publish-verbatim policy).

v7_7_validity_closure.description: Closes A1–A5 + B1–B2 + C1 from the post-v7.6 gap inventory. 5 new gates (4 write-time + 1 cycle-time) + 1 advisory permanent. Bulk-backfills 32 case-study frontmatters. Plus framework-health dashboard at fitme-story /control-room/framework. Reaches 25 mechanical gates + 1 advisory.

cache_hits_empty_post_v6.rule: Post-v6 features with current_phase=complete must have at least one entry in cache_hits[]. Effective coverage went from 0% (v7.7 spec-only) to firing-as-designed after PR #169 (created_at field migration) + PR #173 (predicate fix).

cu_v2_invalid.rule: cu_v2 schema must validate (factors object with required keys + numeric values in 0..1).

state_no_case_study_link.rule: current_phase=complete requires case_study or parent_case_study field, or case_study_type EXEMPT tag.

case_study_missing_fields.rule: Case-study frontmatter must include work_type, dispatch_pattern, success_metrics, kill_criteria for non-exempt types.

tier_tag_likely_incorrect.rule: Heuristically flags T1 quantitative claims that have no ledger match. Permanent advisory — kill criterion 2 fired at baseline so it ships advisory-only.

honesty_fixes_2026_05_01.description: Closed v7.7 silent-pass surface. 43/46 state.json migrated created → created_at so CACHE_HITS_EMPTY_POST_V6 actually fires. Added SCHEMA_DRIFT regression check + FRAMEWORK_VERSION_FORMAT check. Fixed broken downstream consumer measurement-adoption-report.py.

v7_8_pr1_advisory.description: Mechanism C scaffolding — auto-instrumentation for cache_hits[] writer-path (closes Class B gap #1 in advisory mode). PostToolUse:Read hook + scripts/observe-cache-hit.py write session-ledger events to .claude/logs/_session-<id>.events.jsonl. Plus the gate-predicate fix that lifted CACHE_HITS_EMPTY_POST_V6 effective coverage from 0/46 to all post-2026-05-02 features.
v7_8_pr1_advisory.advisory_mode_until: v7.9 enforcement flip — earliest data-justified date: 2026-05-09 (≥7 days post-shipment for calibration)

skill_on_demand.description: Load only phase-relevant SKILL.md files instead of all 11. Saves ~30K tokens/session.

cache_compression.description: Each cache entry has a compressed_view (~200 words) loaded by default. Full expansion on demand. Saves ~24K tokens/session.

model_tiering.description: ANE mixed-precision analog: sonnet for mechanical phases, opus for judgment phases. Advisory tier recommendation per phase.

batch_dispatch.description: TPU weight-stationary analog: load template once, iterate N targets. 5x fewer dispatches for multi-target operations.

result_forwarding.description: UMA zero-copy analog: pass skill output inline to next skill. Eliminates write-to-disk-read-back serialization overhead.

speculative_preload.description: Branch prediction analog: pre-load likely-next-skill cache on skill start. 30-40% latency reduction on skill chains.
speculative_preload.inspiration: CPU branch prediction, validated by arxiv 2510.04371

systolic_chains.description: TPU systolic array analog: isolated pipeline execution. Each skill receives only upstream output + own L1 cache. No global reads mid-chain. Hybrid isolation: full for UX/design, partial for implementation.

task_complexity_gate.description: ARM big.LITTLE analog: classify tasks by complexity, route lightweight to parallel E-core lane (sonnet) and heavyweight to serial P-core lane (opus). Parallel-first execution clears backlog fast.

v5_soc_optimizations.combined_savings: ~54K tokens (items 1+2) + dispatch reduction (item 3) + serialization elimination (item 4) + cost optimization (item 5) + latency reduction (item 6) + bottleneck elimination (item 7) + complexity-aware dispatch (item 8)

v7_8_3_cross_repo_state_sync.description: Cross-repo state-sync release umbrella. 5 phases x 10 PRs in single-day ship. Promotes V2 (CACHE_HITS_AUTO_INSTRUMENTATION_DRIFT) advisory -> enforced; extends V9 Mechanism E driver to .claude/logs/<feature>.log.json; adds 3 new state_owner gates (STATE_OWNER_MISSING + STATE_OWNER_INVALID + STATE_OWNER_LOCATION_MISMATCH morphed C-5); ships D-3 unified cross-repo PR cite cache + C-4 telemetry aggregator + D-1 reverse-sync GH Action; new make snapshot-phase target. Cycle-time gate count: 13 -> 16. Total framework mechanisms: 33 mechanical + 5 advisory.

v7_8_4_pre_v7_9_calibration.description: Patch-level hygiene release. No new enforcement gates with one exception — PR_CACHE_STALE auto-refresh operability gate closes the v7.8.3-era false-positive incident. Cleans the noise floor before the 2026-05-21 v7.9 promotion-decision data freeze (master plan §2.2 promotion criterion #2 'no false positives' is more credible against a clean baseline).

pr_cache_freshness_auto_refresh.trigger: runs before every make integrity-check and inside .github/workflows/integrity-cycle.yml
pr_cache_freshness_auto_refresh.rule: Refresh when .cache/gh-pr-cache.json is empty, missing, or older than 24h. Refresh failure logs to stderr but does NOT abort the run. Closes the 33-finding false-positive incident observed 2026-05-12 from an empty-cache run flagging every PR citation as broken.

fixes: is_target_or_kill_claim() filter — skips T1 claims with target/kill/threshold language (forward-looking declarations not observations)
word-boundary \b after unit regex — eliminates false positives where the unit letter is the first char of a longer word (h in hook, s in schema, d in declared)
intervening tier-marker filter — skips claims whose context contains another T-tag (number likely belongs to the second tier marker)

case_study_t1_references_ledger.purpose: pinned numerical values for T1 claims correctly instrumented but derived/computed (not captured by measurement-adoption.json or documentation-debt.json)

outcome.integrity_check_baseline: 0 findings + 0 advisory (was 35 findings + 9 advisory at session open, 6 advisory after stale-cache fix, 0+0 post-v7.8.4)

v7_8_4_pre_v7_9_calibration.no_regression_vs: all v7.5 → v7.8.3 gates fire identically

v7_8_5_observability_layer.description: Two operator-facing observability surfaces — documentation + a hook. No new gates; no telemetry impact on 2026-05-21 v7.9 promotion data.

observed_patterns_catalog.operator_rule: any new pattern surfaced during a session MUST be appended to the catalog before the protocol closes the feature

w9_branch_drift_alert.purpose: detects when the current git branch has changed unexpectedly between tool calls within a session (typically because another concurrent Claude session sharing the same git working directory ran git checkout)
w9_branch_drift_alert.behavior: emits LOUD stderr warning surfaced back to the assistant via tool output, with a 4-step recovery playbook

v7_8_5_observability_layer.operator_obligation: when any framework gate or advisory fires during a session, the FIRST step is to check the catalog (make observed-patterns). Apply documented remediation if pattern matches; investigate only if novel; ALWAYS append a new entry when surfacing a novel pattern.

v7_8_6_cadence_batch.description: Closes the 96-hour drift window between the weekly framework-status cron (Mon 05:00 UTC) and the 72-hour integrity cycle. No new enforcement gates; every addition is a read/diff/warn surface.

unified_preflight_entry_point.rule: Mandatory Phase 0.0 step in /pm-workflow; all 10 downstream skills read from this cache

weekly_gate_coverage_zero_drift_scan.trigger: opens digest issue with reason 'A2 gate-coverage' when any previously-emitting gate stops

per_dimension_adoption_trend_nudge.trigger: opens digest issue with reason 'A4 per-dimension' on any decrease
per_dimension_adoption_trend_nudge.addresses: documented fully_adopted_post_v6 27.3% → 8.3% regression + cu_v2 ≥50% chronic miss

w1_ssh_agent_preflight.purpose: loud stderr warning when ssh-add -l returns no identities — prevents documented W1 silent-sign-hang failure mode

weekly_dependency_audit.covers: npm audit --omit=dev across root + website + dashboard + Swift Package.resolved pins
weekly_dependency_audit.trigger: opens issue on any HIGH or CRITICAL

daily_stale_branch_warning.lists: local branches whose remote is gone ([gone]) + isolated worktrees in .claude/worktrees/

daily_open_prs_idle_24h_babysit.behavior: calls gh pr list for FT2 + fitme-story; filters to PRs idle >24h (oldest first); silent no-op when gh unavailable

follow_up_tracker.purpose: single ledger for calendar-anchored verifications (B1 v7.9 freeze, B2 post-v7.9 baseline, B4/B5 quarterly test audit) + feature-scope MUST items
follow_up_tracker.surface: daily checkpoint script surfaces upcoming items ≤14d

v7_9_promotion.description: Enforcement-flip release. The three v7.8.1 advisory gates (BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION Mode B + Mode C + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS) flipped to enforced after a 14-day Mechanism A telemetry calibration window confirmed 0 false positives. Single code change: BRANCH_ISOLATION_ADVISORY_MODE = True → False at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132. No new gate code; no new schema fields; no new observability surfaces.

promotion_decision_criteria.criterion_3_no_silent_skips: ✓ all skip reasons map to legitimate conditions (not_infra_commit_level, not_complete_transition, opt_out_false_or_absent)

BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION_mode_b.scope: infra commit-level — fires when staged files match infra-path globs (.githooks/*, .github/workflows/*, scripts/*, .claude/skills/*, .claude/shared/*, CLAUDE.md, docs/architecture/*, Makefile, OR feature has work_subtype: framework_feature, OR work_type: chore)

BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION_mode_c.scope: per-state.json — fires on current_phase mutations from a non-feature branch
BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION_mode_c.opt_out_field: per-feature isolation_opt_out: true (Mode B/infra ignores it)

FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS_write_time.scope: fires on current_phase=complete transitions; validates 7 required case-study frontmatter fields + Q7 kill_criteria_resolution + Q6 bidirectional PR-list parity

gates_already_enforced_no_v7_9_action: Mechanism A coverage gates + Mechanism C session-attribution (enforced at v7.8)
Mechanism E custom merge driver V9 (enforced at v7.8.3 Phase 0)

milestones.2026_05_22_b11_ucc_t_plus_3d_check: executed PASS — signals 1+2+3 PASS (auth_lockout=0; email_not_allowlisted hash mismatch; counter_replay=0); signals 4+5 deferred to first organic sign-in
milestones.2026_05_27_b12_hardening_t_plus_7d_kill_: executed PROMOTE verdict via PR #503 squash bca2e12

v7_9_promotion.reversibility_runbook: flip back via single-line edit at scripts/check-state-schema.py:132 (BRANCH_ISOLATION_ADVISORY_MODE = True), commit on chore/v7-9-rollback, merge to main. <5 min end-to-end.
